Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Continued To Dec-14-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Continued To Dec-23-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua Ezrin, Esq.(415-553-6066) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Christina Velasco.
Andrew Sclar, Esq. (415-362-7126) and Robert Sheppard, Esq. (415-296-0900 x23) for Defendant/Moving party THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION.
Court reporter: Nancy Presant-McDonald, CSR 906, 818-551-7300, Reported. (501).

Defendant Argued Demurrer. Both sides ARGUED. Defendant argues Statue of limitation on rent ordinance, delayed discovery, misrepresentation. Plaintiff argues motive on IIED, harrassment, bad faith.

Defendant Argued motion to strike. Defendant argues attorney's fees, troubled damages and punitive damages.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Nancy Presant-McDonald, CSR 906, 818-551-7300, Reported. (501).

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Continued To Dec-23-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua Ezrin, Esq.(415-553-6066) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Christina Velasco.
Andrew Sclar, Esq. (415-362-7126) and Robert Sheppard, Esq. (415-296-0900 x23) for Defendant/Moving party THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION.
Court reporter: Nancy Presant-McDonald, CSR 906, Reported. (501).

Defendant Argued Demurrer. Both sides ARGUED. Defendant argues Statue of limitation on rent ordinance, delayed discovery, misrepresentation. Plaintiff argues motive on IIED, harrassment, bad faith.

Defendant Argued motion to strike. Defendant argues attorney's fees, troubled damages and punitive damages.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Nancy Presant-McDonald, CSR 906, 818-551-7300, Reported. (501).

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Continued To Oct-27-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to October 27, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than September 30, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
